entry.title: ASSIGN TWO ADOBE FORMS TO A PAYMENT METHOD
entry.content:
Hello team, i would like to assign two adobe Forms to a payment Method.

i have tried to do this by following this path :

 

I selected the company code and chose '' allocate forms to payment method in company code''. Then i assign the first adobe forms for the payment method ''W'' under ''pdf based payment medium forms '' section. 

I wanted to assign the other adobe form under '' pdf  based additional payment medium form '' but this field is desactivated. As you can see below.. I cannot do anything there.

 

Can someone help me please ?

entry.title: Quick selection of multiple company codes at once
entry.content: Hi - on SAP Public cloud edition, in GL reporting is there anyway to select all company codes without having to go through each one and add them one by one?

entry.title: Partner Bank Type
entry.content:
Hello Consultants,

My business posted an accounting document to the same vendor in year 2022 & 2023 using tcode FB01. For the year 2023 they had an option to enter the partner bank type data during posting but the open was not available in for 2022 postings. Please let me know what could be the reason for the same.

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding SAP Project Systems and Transition from ECC to S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently researching best practices in SAP Project Systems, particularly focusing on any differences between the ECC and S/4HANA environments.

Through my initial research, I have not come across specific information detailing the changes or enhancements in Project Systems with the transition to S/4HANA. I would greatly appreciate it if you could provide confirmation regarding whether there have been any updates, enhancements, or best practices introduced in SAP Project Systems within the S/4HANA environment.

Furthermore, I am seeking any available documentation or resources that outline best practices for implementing and utilizing Project Systems in S/4HANA.

Your assistance in this matter would be immensely valuable to me. Please let me know if there are any specific channels or resources I should refer to for this information.

Thank you very much for your attention to this inquiry. I look forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,

Nikki

entry.title: New Special GL Indicator
entry.content:
Dear Community/Experts,

In Our current project, we have some Employee Advances/ loans  Given to Employees/Staff members that need to be captured as Down payments to Employees in seperate GLs and many similar Advances for which they need to have a seperate Special GL indicator.

Would you please guide us on how can we achieve this Requirement

Thank you

entry.title: Product Cost Estimation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

When I run "material cost estimation" by using transaction code ck11n,
activity cost and activity IOH cost values not updating. Could please anyone help me. 

Regards,

Prabhakar

entry.title: Need help with OLMRLIST
entry.content:
Trying to add Batch to the MIRO table control. I followed:
https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/olmrlist/qaq-p/5841292

See screen shots.
Do I check 'W. content' to bring in the new field? I tried that, but nothing happens.
After I adjusted, there's the message 'Screen variant adapted' but also there's that title 'Screen Variant Contains Errors' but there's no additional information.

Leo

entry.title: Periodic report for number of concurrent users in SAP.
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We want to get the number of concurrent users periodically in SAP. Is there any SAP report which can provide this detail periodically?

entry.title: Error occurs on hdbviews execution after adding meins field to FBL3H
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am adding meins to fbl3h but when I try to execute HDBviews for adding new field to FBL3H it occurs error. Also when I delete the meins field error become disapeared.

Thanks for reply.

entry.title: Conciliate a invoice to a payment (using API)
entry.content:
Hello community!

I want to emulate a conciliation (via API) between an invoice issued to a customer and a payment received from this customer. I have some questions:

1) The only thing I found to enter an invoice to SAP is the Supplier Invoice API (I didn't see anything related to Customer Invoice). Supplier Invoice is the only entity that represents an invoice in SAP?

2) To create a payment I saw that Journal API is used, understanding that it acts as an input/output in the SAP ledger, is this ok to emulate a customer payment?

3) How is form of the "link" between the invoice and the journal entry done? is there any field in the invoice of the "balance" that was deducted or an "id" that the invoice was linked referring to the journal entry?

Greetings!

entry.title: Attachment / File symbol in FBL1n and FAGLL03
entry.content:
How is it possible to add the file attachment symbol to FAGLL03 or FBL1N? It is required to see in the line item display which documents have an attachment rather than opening each document to see if an attachment exist.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: TABLE_FREE_IN_LOOP Error at S4 Standart SAPMF05B
entry.content:
Hi experts, I am facing with that error message per I try to use FB08.

Waiting for your advises.

Please see the code below.

entry.title: SLT Central finance data replication using RFC commutation
entry.content:
Hi All,
Can anyone let me know how the data is passed from SAP SLT to the target system when the connection is based on RFC Communication? I was trying to technically understand how the data was being replicated to the CFIN system from the source system using SLT.

I found out that there are function modules responsible for posting data into CFIN (e.g., FINS_CFIN_AC_DOC_GENERATE_BULK, FINS_CFIN_CO_CENTRAL_POSTING, etc.), but these function modules are not remote-enabled. I read in a blog that the MWB (Migration Workbench) object holds the rules that transform the data from the table-based structures on the source system into the remote function module interface of the central finance system.

I want to know how the data is finally passed to functions such as FINS_CFIN_AC_DOC_GENERATE_BULK from SLT, which then posts the data into CFIN ?

Regards,
John

entry.title: Condition contract settlement accrual reversal: total value on first line item
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I perform the condition contract settlement of a customer condition contract in WB2R_SC

We are using EHP with all activated business functions and customizing is consistent with documentation from note 2723516.

I have accruals that should be reversed with the settlement. We have multiple line items and I created accruals on line item (for all articles system created accruals with every invoice). Now performing the settlement, the system determines the correct value of accruals and reverses them. On header level it looks good. But on item level it does not: System puts the accrual reversal REA2 in total on the first line item. So i have a huge accrual reversal on the first line item and no accrual reversals on the other line items.

From finance perspective this is not an issue but it does in controlling CO-PA, because the full accrual reversal is on one line / item. Example with dummy data below:

How can we achieve that system puts accrual reversal on those articles / line items, where it build the accruals ? and not everything on the first item ?

 

Thanks and best regards

SAP S/4HANA for enterprise contract managementSettlement Management

entry.title: How to Split a Bill of Exchange?
entry.content:
How to Split a Bill of Exchange? For example, a bill of exchange of 100,000 is split into two, which are 40,000 and 60,000 respectively.

entry.title: Manual depreciation on sap
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I tried to create the following fixed asset acquisition on SAP B1 , 

After I created a manual depreciation on the same item,

Here you will find the details of the summary and amortization of the years:

The problems I have is that the total planned depreciation is different from the recorded depreciation (manual depreciation)

Second problem is that the depreciation recorded in the dates 2021 AND 2022 for each year must be 1126 MAD but SAP calculates 1128.

Third problem is that if I want to create another manual depreciation on the same item, the following error message is displayed:

NBV of asset "IM000003" cannot fall below zero; change the total

Any ideas ?

Regards

entry.title: Validation on Transaction Amount T Code FB50
entry.content:
I am trying to put validation on the transaction amount in T code FB50, but the validation not working below is Prereq, check, and message for ready reference

Prereq:

Company Code = '1000' AND Document type = 'SA' AND G/L = '20002' AND Transaction Code = 'FB50'

Check: Amount < '2000.00'

what I want is for someone to post more than 2000 system give message.

entry.title: API details needed for posting payment advice through FPAV in FI-CA
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I find below API from SAP business hub for posting payment advice, but these APIs are posting payment advice in FI module, not in FICA module.

API Reference | Payment Advice - Create | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Overview | Payment Advice (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

Can someone help us to conclude if we have the API or not.

Regards.

Till

PS: Copied this question from Tech to subject group, as not replied for long.

Original Question: API details needed for posting payment advice thro... - SAP Community

entry.title: The General ledge balance and funds management commitment item balances are not matching
entry.content: The issue here is - not matching balances between FI and FM books for the fiscal year 2023. This issue has affected the books of company codes 0058 and 0059. In reference to our analysis, we see that client had posted manual journal entries in the last fiscal year to knock off the open goods receipt as they haven’t received the invoices in that particular fiscal year for few of the purchase orders. Later in the new fiscal year some of the open purchase orders were carry forwarded to the new fiscal year 2023. These manual entries posting and not carry forwarding PO on time may have created the issue of not balancing the FI and FM books. We tried reversing the manually posted journal entries that was posted for goods receipt to fix the issue of FI and FM balance but still there is no luck. Hence wanted to check if we can make direct entries to funds management to balance the amount between general ledgers and commitment or else is there  any other good solution to approach the situation here you had any situation in the past and had any solutions that helped you to fix this. Could you please assist if you have any solutions or steps to fix this issue.
